title: Business Management Fundamentals
shortSummary: How organisations are structured, governed, and managed. Every marketer operates inside a business — understanding how that business works is the foundation of effective marketing.
whyItMatters: Marketing sits within the broader business context. Understanding the POLC framework, organisational structures, stakeholder relationships, and how business objectives cascade into marketing KPIs is essential for any marketer who wants to earn influence and deliver results that matter to the business.
coreConcepts: Business objectives and how they cascade to marketing KPIs
Cross-functional relationships (marketing with sales, finance, product)
